Pertanyaan asli user: Write a highly detailed, descriptive prompt of this image in English for an AI text-to-image generator (such as Midjourney, DALL-E, or Stable Diffusion). Describe the objects, background, style, lighting, color palette, and mood in detail. Do NOT include any introductory or concluding conversational text. Do not say 'Here is the prompt' or similar. Output ONLY the raw description of the image.

A young male with a fresh buzz cut and a neutral expression stands facing forward, his hands cuffed in front of him. He is wearing a bright orange t-shirt with the word "TAHANAN" printed in bold black capital letters across the chest. The background consists of a rough, textured concrete wall and rusty, vertical metal bars, suggesting a prison or detention cell. The lighting is somewhat dim and direct, casting subtle shadows and highlighting the texture of the wall and the metal bars. The overall color palette is dominated by the vibrant orange of the shirt against the muted grays and browns of the background, creating a stark and somber mood. The style is realistic, with a focus on the subject and the implied environment.
